cardCaptureTechnology.description: The technology used to capture the card details.

formFactor.description: The form factor of the device to be provisioned.

imei.description: The IMEI number of the device being provisioned.

isoDeviceType.description: The 2-digit device type provided on the ISO messages that the token is being provisioned to.

msisdn.description: The MSISDN of the device being provisioned.

osName.description: The name of the device operating system.

osVersion.description: The version of the device operating system.

paymentTypes.description: Different types of payments supported for the network token.

serialNumber.description: The serial number of the device.

storageTechnology.description: The architecture or technology used for network token storage.
